name: Egg and Spinach Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 each Corn Tortillas (6 to 7-inches in diameter)
4 ounces Cheese (Shredded), such as Monterey Jack or Chihuahua
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Heat 1/8-inch of vegetable oil in an 8-inch skillet over medium heat until hot.
3. Cook the tortillas, one at a time, in the oil until crisp, about 1 minute. Drain on paper towels and then cut them into small pieces. (Alternatively, use tortilla chips if available.)
4. Heat margarine or butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat. Add bacon, onion, and garlic; cook and stir until the onion is tender.
5. Stir in tomatoes, salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Simmer uncovered for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add spinach; cover and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.
7. Line an ungreased square 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan with tortilla pieces or chips.
8. Spread the spinach mixture over the base.
9. Cut eggs lengthwise into halves and arrange them on the spinach mixture.
10. Pour Basic Green Sauce over the eggs; sprinkle with cheese.
11. Bake, uncovered, until the cheese is melted, about 15 minutes.
